category_title: Disengaged Aboriginal students in an alternative education setting
minimal_context: The class is analyzing a newspaper article about Aboriginal gangs to understand the author's language and comparisons.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's finish reading the newspaper article about Aboriginal gangs from yesterday.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't want to read that again. We should talk about gang clothing, weapons, and initiation rites instead.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We need to focus on the assignment first.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Why do we need to do this? So what?

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Well, what do you all think? So, why do you think the author...OK, let's look at the type of language he uses. He is always comparing us, right? To whom is he comparing us? Why is he doing that?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: It’s all stupid. I didn’t come to school to learn this. This is gay. Boring...boring...boring.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's finish reading the newspaper article about Aboriginal gangs from yesterday.

STUDENT: I don't want to read that again. We should talk about gang clothing, weapons, and initiation rites instead.

TUTOR: We need to focus on the assignment first.

STUDENT: Why do we need to do this? So what?

TUTOR: Well, what do you all think? So, why do you think the author...OK, let's look at the type of language he uses. He is always comparing us, right? To whom is he comparing us? Why is he doing that?

STUDENT: It’s all stupid. I didn’t come to school to learn this. This is gay. Boring...boring...boring.

task.content: Analyze a newspaper article about Aboriginal gangs to look at the type of language the author uses and to whom he is comparing them

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When the teacher asked, 'So, why do you think the author...OK, let's look at the type of language he uses. He is always comparing us, right? To whom is he comparing us? Why is he doing that?'
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Students verbally dismissed the lesson, stating 'It's all stupid', 'This is gay', 'Why do we need to do this?', and 'Boring...boring...boring'
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Frustration with trying to engage in texts and topics they did not choose
related_quotes: It’s all stupid. I didn’t come to school to learn this.
Why do we need to do this? So what?

behavior_patterns.condition: When the teacher attempted to finish reading the newspaper article the next day
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Resisted reading the newspaper article again and on their own initiative diverted to discuss gangs, gang clothing, weapons, gang initiation rites, gang hierarchies, prostitution, and gang protection
